name: python3-click-default-group
title: python3-click-default-group
summary: Extension for Python click adding default subcommand to group (Python 3)
description:
Extension for Python click adding default subcommand to group (Python 3)
DefaultGroup is a sub class of click.Group. But it invokes a default
subcommand instead of showing a help message when a subcommand is not
passed.
.
This package installs the library for Python 3.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-click-default-group because Extension for Python click adding default subcommand to group (Python 3).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-click-default-group as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-click-default-group with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-click-default-group --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
